description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun featuring a striking two-tone color scheme with a matte black lower frame and a deep red slide. The handgun is equipped with a prominent cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel, extending its overall length. The grip is ergonomically contoured with visible texturing for enhanced handling, and the trigger guard is robust and squared, providing ample space for gloved use. The slide has angular serrations for improved manipulation, and the accessory rail beneath the barrel allows for tactical attachments. No visible markings or engravings are present on the slide, and the magazine base is flat and flush with the grip.
description: A modern semi-automatic handgun with a red slide, black frame, and attached suppressor, featuring an ergonomic textured grip and tactical accessory rail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red slide, black grip, and large black suppressor; accessory rail and trigger guard are clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor's circular end and the slim profile of the handgun; minimal detail on the grip or slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the red slide, black grip, and suppressor; slide serrations and accessory rail are visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the slide, grip, and the top of the suppressor; the sight and rear contours are visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with a pronounced ergonomic shape, featuring a textured surface for secure handling. The texturing appears to be stippled or checkered, providing anti-slip properties. The lower portion of the grip is slightly flared for better retention, and there are subtle finger grooves for improved comfort. The material has a matte black finish, likely polymer, with no visible logos or embellishments.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and squared-off, offering a spacious opening suitable for gloved fingers. Its edges are slightly beveled for comfort, and the lower front portion is flat, possibly to accommodate a two-handed grip. There is no visible texturing or reinforcement, but the design is utilitarian and functional.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is extended and fitted with a cylindrical suppressor, giving it a tactical appearance. The suppressor is smooth and matte black, with no visible porting, fluting, or external markings. The overall profile is straight and uniform, with the suppressor seamlessly attached to the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is clean and unadorned, with only angular serrations present for grip.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no visible extension, bevel, or finger rest. The design is simple and streamlined, lacking any logos or texturing.
